body.title: Review goals: consolidate under compiling-inference where applicable
body.result: palace node written at palace.goals.compiling-inference; factory-of-factories/factory-factory/system-self-improving identified as compiling-inference expressions
body.intention: I intend that goals which are all expressions of the same north star ('compile inference / make the system take over coding from LLMs') are consolidated so ticket prioritization and decision-making have a single clear anchor.
body.description:
Read the current goal list from the palace (`psql ... SELECT path, title FROM memory_palace WHERE path LIKE '%goal%'`). For each goal, ask: is this an expression of 'compiling inference' (making the system incrementally take over parts of coding from LLMs)? If yes, mark it as a child of or alias for the compiling-inference goal. If not, note why it's distinct.

Output: a short doc (not a ticket batch) listing: goals consolidated under compiling-inference, goals that stand alone with a one-sentence reason, and any goals that should be retired as already-achieved.

**Affected files:** memory_palace (DB read + possible updates), lab/design_docs/ (new doc if warranted)
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** IN — read goals, write consolidation notes, update palace metadata. OUT — creating new goals, closing tickets.
**Completion criteria:** A written summary (palace node or MD file) lists every current goal with its relationship to compiling-inference; no goal is left unclassified.
